title: Quarterly KPI Dashboard
description: Business-health KPIs on a quarterly rhythm: revenue growth, margin, cash cycle, burn, and runway. Composed from published income-statement totals, bank balances, AR/AP aging, and the latest forecast snapshot.
period_caveat: Showing the latest available snapshot. Per-quarter filtering for {{quarter}} is pending backend parameterization.

role_gate.title: Access restricted
role_gate.description: The Quarterly KPI dashboard is available to Owner, CFO, and Senior roles. Ask your Owner or CFO if you need access.

empty.title: No KPI data yet
empty.description: Once income statements and aging reports have been generated for this tenant, KPIs will populate here.

revenue_growth.label: Revenue
revenue_growth.tooltip: Revenue in the current closed period compared with the prior period. Percent change is signed: positive = growth, negative = contraction.

margin.label: Margin
margin.tooltip: Gross margin = (Revenue − COGS) ÷ Revenue. Operating margin = (Revenue − COGS − Operating Expenses) ÷ Revenue. Figures from the latest income statement.

cash_cycle.label: Cash Cycle
cash_cycle.tooltip: Simplified cash conversion cycle = DSO − DPO. DSO = average days sales outstanding (AR aging). DPO = average days payable outstanding (AP aging). Days inventory outstanding (DIO) is not currently tracked on the aging module, so this is the two-component approximation of the classical IAS 2 CCC formula.

burn.label: Burn Rate
burn.tooltip: Average monthly expense run-rate from the latest income statement (COGS + Operating Expenses). Projected burn is the average monthly expense over the next three forecast months.

runway.label: Runway
runway.tooltip: Months of runway = total cash balance ÷ monthly burn. Capped at 99 months for display. When expenses are below revenue (profitable), runway is shown as 'Profitable' rather than a finite number.
